    About Us

    High Spirits

    Where Tradition Meets Luxury in Every Bite

    Our Mission

    At High Spirits, we bring the soul of India to the heart of Bunbury, WA, crafting an experience that goes far beyond a meal. As a refined restaurant & bar, our vision is rooted in authenticity, honouring time-loved Indian recipes while presenting them with modern elegance and thoughtful detail.

    We see food as an art form and a celebration of culture, connection, and life’s finest moments. Every dish carries a story of heritage, passion, and uncompromising quality, designed to be savoured slowly and remembered fondly.

    Our Philosophy

    Core Values

    Passion

    Every dish is crafted with love and dedication to authentic flavors

    Excellence

    We pursue perfection in every aspect of the dining experience

    Quality

    Only the finest ingredients meet our exacting standards

    Innovation

    Tradition meets modern culinary artistry in every creation

    The Team

    Passionate Professionals

    Our team of expert chefs, sommeliers, and hospitality professionals work in perfect harmony to create an unforgettable experience.

    From Punjab to Australia

    Our business partner, Ishpreet Bedi, grew up in the heart of Punjab, where hospitality is a way of life.

    With a refined vision shaped by hospitality experience across India and Australia, Ishpreet leads the brand with a focus on operational excellence and cultural authenticity.

    Our Journey

    Milestones & Achievements

    2003

    The Beginning

    High Spirit was founded with a vision to bring authentic Indian luxury dining to Australia

    2008

    First Award

    Recognized as Best Indian Restaurant in Sydney

    2015

    Expansion

    Opened our second location and introduced our signature tasting menu

    2020

    Global Recognition

    Featured in the World's 50 Best Restaurants list for Indian cuisine

    Recognition

    Awards & Accolades

    15+ Culinary Awards

    Recognition from prestigious organizations

    Top 3 in Sydney

    Consistently ranked among the best

    50,000+ Happy Guests

    Creating memories since 2003

    HIGH SPIRITS

    Authentic Indian flavours crafted with passion, served in a premium fine-dining experience.
